zh.lifeSummary: 當Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen於大約1052年出生在瑞士福包格薩林時，她的父親Conon d'Oltingen24歲，母親Regina de Luxembourg31歲。她和Renaud de Bourgogne II至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1107年8月15日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易馬尼享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen于大约1052年出生在瑞士福包格薩林时，她的父亲Conon d'Oltingen24岁，母亲Regina de Luxembourg31岁。她和Renaud de Bourgogne II至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1107年8月15日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易馬尼享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Regina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin vocabulary word meaning ‘queen’. It was occasionally used as a given name among the early Christians; a St Regina , probably of the 3rd century, was venerated as a virgin martyr at Autun from an early date. In modern use it is normally borne by Roman Catholics in allusion to the epithet Regina Coeli ‘Queen of Heaven’, a cult title of the Virgin Mary since the 8th century.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen was born about 1052, in Sarine, Fribourg, Switzerland, her father, Conon d'Oltingen, was 24 and her mother, Regina de Luxembourg, was 31. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Renaud de Bourgogne II. She died on 15 August 1107, in Marcigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen est née environ 1052, à Sarine, Fribourg, Suisse, son père, Conon d'Oltingen, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Regina de Luxembourg, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Renaud de Bourgogne II. Elle est décédée le 15 août 1107, à Marcigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen um 1052 in Saane, Freiburg, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Conon d'Oltingen 24 und ihre Mutter Regina de Luxembourg 31. Sie hatte mit Renaud de Bourgogne II mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. August 1107 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Marcigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen è nata il circa 1052 nel Sarine, Friburgo, Svizzera, sua padre, Conon d'Oltingen, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Regina de Luxembourg, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Renaud de Bourgogne II. Morì il 15 agosto 1107, nel Marcigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingenが約1052年にスイスフレイブルグサリンで生まれた時，父Conon d'Oltingenは24歳，母Regina de Luxembourgは31歳であった。彼女はRenaud de Bourgogne IIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1107年8月15日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーマルシグニーで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen(이)가 대략 1052년 스위스 프레이버그 사라이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conon d'Oltingen(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Regina de Luxembourg(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Renaud de Bourgogne II(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1107년 8월 15일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 마시그니에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen nasceu aproximadamente 1052, em Sarine, Freiburg, Suiça, seu pai, Conon d'Oltingen, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Regina de Luxembourg, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Renaud de Bourgogne II. Ela faleceu em 15 de agosto de 1107, em Marcigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen родилась около 1052 г. в местности сараин, фрибург, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Conon d'Oltingen было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Regina de Luxembourg, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Renaud de Bourgogne II. Она умерла 15 августа 1107 г. в местности марсигни, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen nació aproximadamente 1052, en Sarine, Freiburg, Suiza, su papá, Conon d'Oltingen, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Regina de Luxembourg, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Renaud de Bourgogne II. Murió el 15 de agosto de 1107, en Marcigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 56 años.
